Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT(S) ROBERT ELMAN and SYLVIA ELMANS' MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Cross-Complainant was granted leave to amend the cross-complaint to effectuate the changes outlined in Motion for Leave to Amend 5:11-20. Paragraphs 23 and 24 have been so identified; cause of action for Elder Abuse has not. Therefore, motion to strike is granted as to the cause of action for Elder Abuse improperly included in the Second Amended Cross-Complaint without leave of Court; and denied as to paragraphs 23 and 24. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
